textByHash.7995f31f5433ae2c05250283638b4e7170d5ac4e: How am I supposed to get past this?
textByHash.e551472417158465505d367655345806cdaa311d: If I'd been any slower, I would've lost my head!
textByHash.c80d110ecca5cccefbb459ff36c1ec62eb3f16f9: Buying that ring was definitely a wise investment.
textByHash.5a3fe5bdce91976c5470a51dcbda5c4230f7edb9: Well, the door to the next floor has already closed. Might as well take a break.
textByHash.6673816daf9bbc0c5cc1e0a10fb3f5c3aa7f1960: 96... 97... 98... 99 Hallowed marks! Almost enough for that grapple!
textByHash.af1208c0c087068f69bff3cc858e82d5ab33837a: I can't wait until I have enough Hallowed marks to obtain a dark graceful outfit.
textByHash.bf50b2db24322c68c913bf0a185030d12c6cf525: I prefer this floor. Those owls on the next one creep me out!
